case_for: Winston's recent trajectory includes multiple strong outings (23.6 and 26.6 pts) and the pregame consensus projection of 26.6 pts suggests a favorable matchup or expected high volume as a starter, making the 12.0 threshold very reachable.
case_against: Winston's game log is highly volatile with multiple sub-1-point disasters (0.1 and 0.3 pts), suggesting boom-or-bust variance tied to turnovers or benching risk that could sink him below the threshold on any given week.
